should not exceed 2.0 per cent

3.2 Banks/PDs/ Co-operative banks may, with the approval of their Boards, arrive at
the prudential limits for borrowing/lending in Call/Notice Money Market in terms of
guidelines given in paragraph 3.1 above.
enriched_requirements.object: of their Boards, arrive at the prudential limits for borrowing/lending in Call/Notice Money Market in terms of guidelines given in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The limits so arrived at may be conveyed to
the Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: Clearing Corporation of India Ltd

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Documentation
Eligible participants may adopt the documentation suggested by FIMMDA from time
to time.
enriched_requirements.object: by FIMMDA from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.3 OTC deals should be reported within 15 minutes on NDS-Call reporting platform,
irrespective of the size of the deal or whether the counterparty is a member of the
NDS-Call or not.
enriched_requirements.object: minutes on NDS-Call reporting platform, irrespective of the size of the deal or whether the counterparty is a member of the NDS-

conditions: In case of any misreporting or repeated reporting of OTC deals by a party
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.6 In case of any misreporting or repeated reporting of OTC deals by a party, the
same should be immediately brought to the notice of Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai either through e-
mail or through fax (022-22702290).
enriched_requirements.object: the notice of Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai either through e-

conditions: In case the situation so warrants
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.7 In case the situation so warrants, the Reserve Bank may call for information in
respect of money market transactions of eligible participants.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of money market transactions of eligible participants

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: CP shall be issued as a 'stand-alone' product.
enriched_requirements.object: 'stand-alone' product

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks and FIs may, based on their commercial judgement, subject to the
prudential norms as applicable to them, with the specific approval of their
respective Boards, choose to provide stand-by assistance/credit, back-stop
facility etc.
enriched_requirements.object: commercial judgement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-bank entities (including corporates) may provide unconditional and
irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement for CP issue provided:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: guarantee for credit enhancement for CP issue provided: i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate amount of CP that can be issued by an issuer shall at all times
be within the limit as approved by its Board of Directors or the quantum
indicated by the CRA for the specified rating, whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: within the limit as approved by its Board of Directors or the quantum indicated by the CRA for the specified rating, whichever is lowe

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks and FIs shall have the flexibility to fix working capital limits, duly taking
into account the resource pattern of company's financing, including CP.
enriched_requirements.object: fix working capital limits, duly taking into account the resource pattern of company's financing, including CP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An issue of CP by an FI shall be within the overall umbrella limit prescribed in
the Master Circular/Direction on Resource Raising Norms for FIs, issued by the
Department of Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India,
enriched_requirements.object: umbrella limit prescribed in the Master Circular/Direction on Resource Raising Norms for FIs, issued by the Department of Bankin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The total amount of CP proposed to be issued should be raised within a period
of two weeks from the date on which the issuer opens the issue for
subscription.
enriched_requirements.object: period of two weeks from the date on which the issuer opens the issue for subscription

conditions: provided that in the latter case
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CP may be issued on a single date or in parts on different dates
provided that in the latter case, each CP shall have the same maturity date.
enriched_requirements.object: date

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Every issue of CP, and every renewal of a CP, shall be treated as a fresh issue.
enriched_requirements.object: fresh issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Individuals, banks, other corporate bodies (registered or incorporated in India)
and unincorporated bodies, Non-Resident Indians and Foreign Institutional
Investors (FIIs) shall be eligible to invest in CP.
enriched_requirements.object: in CP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FIIs shall be eligible to invest in CPs subject to (i) such conditions as may be
set for them by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI);
enriched_requirements.object: in CPs subject to (i) such conditions as may be set for them by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CP shall be issued in the form of a promissory note (as specified in Annex
III to this Direction) and held in physical form or in a dematerialized form
through any of the depositories approved by and registered with SEBI,
provided that all RBI regulated entities can deal in and hold CP only in
dematerialised form through such depositories.
enriched_requirements.object: form of a promissory note (as specified in Annex III to this Direction) and held in physical form or in a dematerialized form through any of the depositories approved by and registered with SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fresh investments by all RBI-regulated entities shall be only in dematerialised
form.
enriched_requirements.object: form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: CP shall be issued in denominations of Rs.
enriched_requirements.object: of Rs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
amount invested by a single investor should not be less than Rs.

CP shall be issued at a discount to face value as may be determined by the
issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: discount to face value as may be determined by the issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: No issuer shall have the issue of CP underwritten or co-accepted.
enriched_requirements.object: CP underwritten or co-accepted

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CP shall be issued for maturities between a minimum of 7 days and a
maximum of up to one year from the date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: between a minimum of 7 days and a maximum of up to one year from the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The maturity date of the CP shall not go beyond the date up to which the
credit rating of the issuer is valid.
enriched_requirements.object: up to which the credit rating of the issuer is valid

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Every issuer must appoint an IPA for issuance of CP.
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of CP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issuer should disclose to the potential investors, its latest financial
position as per the standard market practice.
enriched_requirements.object: investors, its latest financial position as per the standard market practice

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
After the exchange of confirmation of the deal between the investor and the
issuer, the issuer shall arrange for crediting the CP to the Demat account of
the investor with the depository through the IPA.
enriched_requirements.object: CP to the Demat account of the investor with the depository through the IPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issuer shall give to the investor a copy of IPA certificate to the effect that
the issuer has a valid agreement with the IPA and documents are in order
(Annex IV).
enriched_requirements.object: a copy of IPA certificate to the effect that the issuer has a valid agreement with the IPA and documents are in order (Annex IV)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
5.4 Rating Requirement
Eligible participants/issuers shall obtain credit rating for issuance of CP from any one
of the SEBI registered CRAs.
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of CP from any one of the SEBI registered CRAs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The minimum credit rating shall be 'A3' as per rating
symbol and definition prescribed by SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: rating symbol and definition prescribed by SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The issuers shall ensure at the time of
issuance of the CP that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for
review.
enriched_requirements.object: of issuance of the CP that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investor in CP (primary subscriber) shall pay the discounted value of the
CP to the account of the issuer through the IPA.
enriched_requirements.object: of the CP to the account of the issuer through the IPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The holder of a CP in dematerialised form shall get the CP redeemed and
enriched_requirements.object: and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Issuers/IPAs shall follow the operational guidelines issued by FIMMDA, from
time to time, with the approval of RBI.
enriched_requirements.object: issued by FIMMDA, from time to time, with the approval of RBI

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 15 minutes of the trade to the
Financial Market Trade Reporting and Confirmation Platform
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All OTC trades in CP shall be reported within 15 minutes of the trade to the
Financial Market Trade Reporting and Confirmation Platform ("F-TRAC") of
Clearcorp Dealing System (India) Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: minutes of the trade to the Financial Market Trade Reporting and Confirmation Platform ("F-TRAC") of Clearcorp Dealing System (I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Participants adhering to the extant laws such as stamp duty as may be
applicable;

OTC trades in CP shall be settled through the clearing house of the National
Stock Exchange (NSE), i.e., the National Securities Clearing Corporation
Limited (NSCCL), the clearing house of the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE),
i.e., Indian Clearing Corporation Limited (ICCL), and the clearing house of the
MCX-Stock Exchange, i.e., MCX-SX Clearing Corporation Limited (CCL), as
per the norms specified by NSCCL, ICCL and CCL from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: clearing house of the National Stock Exchange (NSE), i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The settlement cycle for OTC trades in CP shall either be T+0 or T+1.
Issuers may buyback the CP, issued by them to the investors, before maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: by them to the investors, before maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Buyback of CP shall be through the secondary market and at prevailing
market price.
enriched_requirements.object: market and at prevailing market price

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CP shall not be bought back before a minimum period of 7 days from the
date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: a minimum period of 7 days from the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Issuer shall intimate the IPA of the buyback undertaken.
enriched_requirements.object: the buyback undertaken

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Buyback of CPs should be undertaken after taking approval from the Board of
Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: approval from the Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Issuer
The issuer shall ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for the
issuance of CP are strictly adhered to.
enriched_requirements.object: and procedures laid down for the issuance of CP are strictly adhered to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The IPA shall ensure that the issuer has the minimum credit rating as
stipulated by RBI and the amount mobilised through issuance of CP is within
the quantum indicated by CRA for the specified rating or as approved by its
Board of Directors, whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: has the minimum credit rating as stipulated by RBI and the amount mobilised through issuance of CP is within the quantum indica

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The IPA shall certify that it has a valid agreement with the issuer (Annex IV).
enriched_requirements.object: a valid agreement with the issuer (Annex IV)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The IPA shall verify that all the documents submitted by the issuer, viz., copy
of board resolution, signatures of authorised executants (when CP is issued in
physical form) are in order and shall issue a certificate to this effect.
enriched_requirements.object: documents submitted by the issuer, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Certified copies of original documents, verified by the IPA, shall be held in the
custody of IPA.
enriched_requirements.object: custody of IPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All scheduled banks, acting as IPAs, shall report the details of issuance of CP
on the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) module of the RBI within two
days from the date of issuance of the CP.
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of CP on the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) module of the RBI within two days from the date of issuance of the CP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
IPAs, shall immediately report, on occurrence, full particulars of defaults in
repayment of CP to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai-400 001
enriched_requirements.object: full particulars of defaults in repayment of CP to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Departme

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
IPAs shall also report all instances of buyback of CPs undertaken by the
issuer to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai-400 001
(email) in the format as given in Annex VI of this Direction.
enriched_requirements.object: of buyback of CPs undertaken by the issuer to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CRAs shall abide by the Code of Conduct prescribed by the SEBI for CRAs
for undertaking rating of capital market instruments, which shall be applicable
for rating CPs.
enriched_requirements.object: of Conduct prescribed by the SEBI for CRAs for undertaking rating of capital market instruments, which shall be applicable for ratin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CRAs shall have the discretion to determine the validity period of the
rating depending upon their perception about the strength of the issuer;
enriched_requirements.object: determine the validity period of the rating depending upon their perception about the strength of the issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
they shall, at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due
for review.
enriched_requirements.object: of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The CRAs shall closely monitor the rating assigned to issuers vis-à-vis their
track record at regular intervals and shall make their revision in the ratings
public through their publications and website.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to issuers vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and shall make their revision in the ratings public t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Non-applicability of Certain Other Directions
Nothing contained in the Non-Banking Financial Companies Acceptance of Public
Deposits (Reserve Bank) Directions, 1998 shall apply to the acceptance of deposit
by issuance of CP, by any NBFC in accordance with these guidelines.
enriched_requirements.object: of deposit by issuance of CP, by any NBFC in accordance with these guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Minimum Size of Issue and Denominations
Minimum amount of a CD should be Rs.1 lakh, i.e., the minimum deposit that could
be accepted from a single subscriber should not be less than Rs.1 lakh, and in
multiples of Rs.

Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) may also
subscribe to CDs, but only on non-repatriable basis, which should be clearly stated
on the Certificate.
enriched_requirements.object: but only on non-repatriable basis, which should be clearly stated on the Certificate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
6.1 The maturity period of CDs issued by banks should not be less than 7 days and
not more than one year, from the date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: days and not more than one year, from the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Discount / Coupon Rate
CDs may be issued at a discount on face value.
enriched_requirements.object: discount on face value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investor should be clearly
informed of the same.
enriched_requirements.object: the same

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Settlement
All OTC trades in CDs shall necessarily be cleared and settled under DVP I
mechanism through the authorised clearing houses {National Securities Clearing
Corporation Limited (NSCCL), Indian Clearing Corporation Limited (ICCL) and MCX
Stock Exchange Clearing Corporation Limited (CCL)} of the stock exchanges.
enriched_requirements.object: settled under DVP I mechanism through the authorised clearing houses {National Securities Clearing Corporation Limited (NSC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, the RBI may relax these restrictions for
temporary periods through a separate notification.
enriched_requirements.object: temporary periods through a separate notification

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Format of CDs
Banks / FIs should issue CDs only in dematerialised form.
enriched_requirements.object: dematerialised form

conditions: if an investor insists on physical certificate
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, if an investor insists on physical certificate, the bank / FI may inform the
Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of
India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 about such instances separately.
enriched_requirements.object: Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 about such in

conditions:
If the
maturity date happens to be a holiday
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the
maturity date happens to be a holiday, the issuing bank / FI should make payment
on the immediate preceding working day.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate preceding working day

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks / FIs, therefore, should fix the period
of deposit in such a manner that the maturity date does not coincide with a holiday to
avoid loss of discount / interest rate.
enriched_requirements.object: deposit in such a manner that the maturity date does not coincide with a holiday to avoid loss of discount / interest rate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: They should be signed by two or more authorised signatories.
enriched_requirements.object: or more authorised signatories

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
15.1 Since CDs are transferable, the physical certificates may be presented for
payment by the last holder.
enriched_requirements.object: by the last holder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The question of liability on account of any defect in the
chain of endorsements may arise.

Those who
deal in these CDs may also be suitably cautioned.

The holders should also
communicate to the issuer by a letter / fax enclosing the copy of the delivery
instruction they had given to their respective DP and intimate the place at which the
payment is requested to facilitate prompt payment.
enriched_requirements.object: issuer by a letter / fax enclosing the copy of the delivery instruction they had given to their respective DP and intimate the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Notice is required to be given in at least one local newspaper;
enriched_requirements.object: at least one local newspaper

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 16.2 The duplicate certificate should be issued only in physical form.
enriched_requirements.object: physical form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The duplicate CD should clearly state that the CD is a Duplicate one stating the
original value date, due date, and the date of issue (as "Duplicate issued on
________").
enriched_requirements.object: CD is a Duplicate one stating the original value date, due date, and the date of issue (as "Duplicate issued on ________")

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounting
Banks / FIs may account the issue price under the Head "CDs issued" and show it
under deposits.
enriched_requirements.object: under the Head "CDs issued" and show it under deposits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Banks / FIs should maintain a register of CDs issued with
complete particulars.
enriched_requirements.object: CDs issued with complete particulars

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Standardised Market Practices and Documentation
Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA) may
prescribe, in consultation with the RBI, for operational flexibility and smooth
functioning of the CD market, any standardised procedure and documentation that
are to be followed by the participants, in consonance with the international best
practices.
enriched_requirements.object: the RBI, for operational flexibility and smooth functioning of the CD market, any standardised procedure and documenta

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Banks / FIs may refer to the Handbook of Market Practices issued by
enriched_requirements.object: of Market Practices issued by

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
19.1 Banks should include the amount of CDs in the fortnightly return under Section
42 of the RBI Act, 1934 and also separately indicate the amount so included by way
of a footnote in the return.
enriched_requirements.object: CDs in the fortnightly return under Section 42 of the RBI Act, 1934 and also separately indicate the amount so included by way o

enriched_requirements.timeline:
within 10 days from
the end of the fortnight to which it pertains
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
19.2 Further, banks / FIs should report the data on issuance of CDs on the web-
based module under the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) within 10 days from
the end of the fortnight to which it pertains.
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of CDs on the web- based module under the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) within 10 days from the end of the fortnight
by a corporate (including NBFCs) with original or initial maturity up to one year and issued by way of private placement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Corporate" means a company as defined in the Companies Act, 2013
(including NBFCs) and a corporation established by an act of any Legislature.
enriched_requirements.object: in the Companies Act, 2013 (including NBFCs) and a corporation established by an act of any Legislature

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs shall also adhere to the directions/guidelines issued by the
Department of Non-Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India
enriched_requirements.object: directions/guidelines issued by the Department of Non-Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India

conditions: if it fulfills the following criteria
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Eligibility to issue NCDs
A corporate shall be eligible to issue NCDs if it fulfills the following criteria, namely,
i.
enriched_requirements.object: NCDs if it fulfills the following criteria, namely, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, paragraph 2 (i) above shall not be applicable to Non-Banking Financial
Companies (NBFCs) including Primary Dealers (PDs).
enriched_requirements.object: Financial Companies (NBFCs) including Primary Dealers (PDs)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.1 An eligible corporate intending to issue NCDs shall obtain credit rating for
issuance of the NCDs from one of the rating agencies, viz., the Credit Rating
Information Services of India Ltd.
enriched_requirements.object: issuance of the NCDs from one of the rating agencies, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Ltd or such other agencies registered with Securities
and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) or such other credit rating agencies as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank of India from time to time, for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India from time to time, for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.2 The minimum credit rating shall be 'A2' as per rating symbol and definition
prescribed by SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: rating symbol and definition prescribed by SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
3.3 The Corporate shall ensure at the time of issuance of NCDs that the rating so
obtained is current and has not fallen due for review.
enriched_requirements.object: of issuance of NCDs that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.1 NCDs shall not be issued for maturities of less than 90 days from the date of
issue.
enriched_requirements.object: of less than 90 days from the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.2 The exercise date of option (put/call), if any, attached to the NCDs shall not fall
within the period of 90 days from the date of issue.
enriched_requirements.object: of 90 days from the date of issue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.3 The tenor of the NCDs shall not exceed the validity period of the credit rating of
the instrument.
enriched_requirements.object: of the credit rating of the instrument

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Denomination
NCDs may be issued in denominations with a minimum of Rs.5 lakh (face value) and
in multiples of Rs.1 lakh.
enriched_requirements.object: with a minimum of Rs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
6.1 The aggregate amount of NCDs issued by a corporate shall be within such limit
as may be approved by the Board of Directors of the corporate or the quantum
indicated by the Credit Rating Agency for the rating granted, whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: as may be approved by the Board of Directors of the corporate or the quantum indicated by the Credit Rating Agency for the rating

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
6.2 The total amount of NCDs proposed to be issued shall be completed within a
period of two weeks from the date on which the corporate opens the issue for
subscription.
enriched_requirements.object: period of two weeks from the date on which the corporate opens the issue for subscription

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.1 The corporate shall disclose to the prospective investors, its financial position as
per the standard market practice.
enriched_requirements.object: investors, its financial position as per the standard market practice

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.2 The auditors of the corporate shall certify to the investors that all the eligibility
conditions set forth in these directions for the issue of NCDs are met by the
corporate.
enriched_requirements.object: that all the eligibility conditions set forth in these directions for the issue of NCDs are met by the corporate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.3 The requirements of all the provisions of the Companies Act, 1956 and the
Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue and Listing of Debt Securities)
Regulations, 2008, or any other law, that may be applicable, shall be complied with
by the corporate.
enriched_requirements.object: the corporate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.4 The Debenture Certificate shall be issued within the period prescribed in the
Companies Act, 1956 or any other law as in force at the time of issuance.
enriched_requirements.object: period prescribed in the Companies Act, 1956 or any other law as in force at the time of issuance

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.5 NCDs may be issued at face value carrying a coupon rate or at a discount to
face value as zero coupon instruments as determined by the corporate.
enriched_requirements.object: value carrying a coupon rate or at a discount to face value as zero coupon instruments as determined by the corporate

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.1 Every corporate issuing NCDs shall appoint a Debenture Trustee (DT) for each
issuance of the NCDs.
enriched_requirements.object: (DT) for each issuance of the NCDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.2 Any entity that is registered as a DT with the SEBI under SEBI (Debenture
Trustees) Regulations, 1993, shall be eligible to act as DT for issue of the NCDs only
enriched_requirements.object: as DT for issue of the NCDs only

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
8.3 The DT shall submit to the Reserve Bank of India such information as required
by it from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India such information as required by it from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
9.1 NCDs may be issued to and held by individuals, banks, Primary Dealers (PDs),
other corporate bodies including insurance companies and mutual funds registered
or incorporated in India and unincorporated bodies, Non-Resident Indians (NRIs)
and Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs).
enriched_requirements.object: held by individuals, banks, Primary Dealers (PDs), other corporate bodies including insurance companies and mutual funds registered o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
9.2 Investments in NCDs by Banks/PDs shall be subject to the approval of the
respective statutes governing them, and approval of their respective regulators.
enriched_requirements.object: approval of the respective statutes governing them, and approval of their respective regulators

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
9.3 Investments by the FIIs shall be subject to extant provisions of the Foreign
Exchange Management Act (FEMA) and rules, regulations, notifications, directions
or orders issued thereunder, and within such limits as may be set forth in this regard
from time to time by SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) and rules, regulations, notifications, directions or orders issued there

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, banks, FIs and PDs are required to make fresh
investments in NCDs only in dematerialised form.
enriched_requirements.object: in NCDs only in dematerialised form

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.2 Corporates shall ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for
issuance of NCD are strictly adhered to.
enriched_requirements.object: and procedures laid down for issuance of NCD are strictly adhered to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.3 The roles, responsibilities, duties and functions of the DTs shall be guided by
these regulations, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees)
Regulations,1993, the trust deed and offer document.
enriched_requirements.object: regulations, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees) Regulations,1993, the trust deed and offer document

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.4 The DTs shall report, within three days from the date of completion of the issue,
the issuance details to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
enriched_requirements.object: from the date of completion of the issue, the issuance details to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.5 DTs should submit to the Reserve Bank of India (on a quarterly basis) a report
on the outstanding amount of NCDs of maturity up to year.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (on a quarterly basis) a report on the outstanding amount of NCDs of maturity up to year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.7 The DTs shall report the information called for under para 10.4, 10.5 and 10.6
of these Directions as per the format notified by the Reserve Bank of India, Financial
Markets Regulation Department, Central Office, Mumbai from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: for under para 10

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.8 Code of Conduct prescribed by the SEBI for the CRAs for undertaking rating of
capital market instruments shall be applicable to them (CRAs) for rating the NCDs.
enriched_requirements.object: (CRAs) for rating the NCDs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.9 The CRA shall have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating
depending upon its perception about the strength of the issuer.
enriched_requirements.object: determine the validity period of the rating depending upon its perception about the strength of the issuer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, CRA
shall, at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review.
enriched_requirements.object: of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
11.10 While the CRAs may decide the validity period of credit rating, they shall
closely monitor the rating assigned to corporates vis-à-vis their track record at
regular intervals and make their revision in the ratings public through their
publications and website.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to corporates vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and make their revision in the ratings public thro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
12.1 Issuers of NCDs of maturity up to one year shall follow the Disclosure
Document brought out by the Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives
Association of India (FIMMDA), in consultation with the Reserve Bank of India as
amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: brought out by the Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA), in consultation with the Re

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 'RBI' means the Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: "Call Money" means deals in overnight funds.
"Notice Money" means deals in funds for 2 - 14 days.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 - 14 days

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: "Term Money" means deals in funds for 15 days-1 year.
enriched_requirements.object: 15 days-1 year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Fortnight" shall be on a reporting Friday basis and would mean the period
from Saturday to the second following Friday, both days inclusive.
enriched_requirements.object: Friday basis and would mean the period from Saturday to the second following Friday, both days inclusive

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: "Bank" or "Banking company" means a banking company as defined in clause
enriched_requirements.object: defined in clause

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Scheduled bank" means a bank included in the Second Schedule of the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
enriched_requirements.object: the Second Schedule of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Primary Dealer (PD)" means a financial institution which holds a valid letter of
authorisation as a PD issued by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: holds a valid letter of authorisation as a PD issued by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 'Company' means a company as defined in the Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: in the Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: 'Issuing and Paying Agent (IPA)' means a Scheduled Bank acting as an IPA.
enriched_requirements.object: as an IPA

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
'CRA' means a Credit Rating Agency registered with Securities and Exchange
Board of India.
enriched_requirements.object: registered with Securities and Exchange Board of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: "Non-banking Company" means a company other than banking company.
enriched_requirements.object: banking company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Non-banking financial company" means a company as defined in Section 45
I (f) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
enriched_requirements.object: in Section 45 I (f) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
"Capital Funds" means the sum of Tier I and Tier II capital as disclosed in the
latest audited balance sheet of the entity.
enriched_requirements.object: I and Tier II capital as disclosed in the latest audited balance sheet of the entity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This Master Direction has been superseded
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 shall have the same meaning as assigned to
them in the said Act.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in the said Act
